positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a trio of forest animals—a fox, a deer, and a baby bear—playing together in a glowing, enchanted forest clearing. The composition should be central and harmonious, featuring clean silhouettes against a complementary, dappled background of emerald and sapphire greens. Use bold linework, woodcut style, and soft, ethereal backlighting to create deep contrast and a magical mood. The art should look perfect for a vintage, high-end apparel print, emphasizing simplicity and charm. Art style: Studio Ghibli meets Scandinavian folk art. Limited palette of muted jewel tones. High contrast, graphic quality.
